episode_title: KT #755 - DR PHIL (ADAM RAY) + SAL VULCANO, + GREG FITZSIMMONS

1.premise: Redefining "N-word" as Nazi lets a Black man weaponize the slur against white supremacists.
A Black man misses Tesla driving because it earned him a different kind of N-word label.

2.premise: Idaho being "full of N-words" refers to Nazis, not Black people.

3.premise: "Tesla Model 3rd Reich" fuses the car brand with Nazi Germany as a product line.

4.premise: "N-word lives don't matter" targets Nazis when N-word is redefined as Nazi.

5.premise: "I hate black people, but not as much as blonde-haired blue-eyed N-words" reveals the N-word means Nazi.

lines.text: You guys remember when driving to Tesla made you a Nazi?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I like being called a different type of N-word.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Which is ironic. I'm from Idaho.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: That place is full of N-words.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I had to go out and buy myself a Tesla Model 3rd Reich.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: See, this joke is only fun and silly if you can remember that the N word means Nazi, right?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: So anyway, I see this group of filthy fucking N words coming down the sidewalk.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And they were headed right towards me because I was screaming out "N word lives don't matter."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Not as much as I hate those blonde-haired, blue-eyed N words.
lines.label: punchline
